subject: App Crash Report
body:
Hi Support Team,

I'm experiencing frequent crashes when using your app. Here are the details:

Device: iPhone 12 Pro
iOS Version: 16.4
App Version: 3.2.1

Steps to reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Navigate to Settings
3. Tap on 'Backup & Sync'
4. App crashes immediately

This happens every time. Please help as I need this for work.

Thanks,
Robert Johnson

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body:
Dear Development Team,

I would like to request a dark mode feature for the app. As someone who works late hours, the bright white interface causes eye strain.

A toggle in settings would be perfect. Many other productivity apps have this feature.

Best regards,
Emily Chen

subject: Login Issue
body:
Hello,

I haven't been able to login to my account for 2 days now. I reset my password but still getting 'Invalid credentials' error.

Username: michael.wilson
Email: mike.w@email.com
Device: Samsung Galaxy S22
Android: 13
App Version: 3.2.1

This is urgent as I have deadlines to meet.

Mike Wilson

subject: Suggestion for Improvement
body:
Hi Team,

Great app overall! Just one suggestion - could you add keyboard shortcuts for common actions? It would speed up workflow significantly.

Keep up the good work!

Alex Thompson

subject: Data Loss Problem
body:
URGENT - DATA LOSS

I lost all my project data after the last update. Everything is gone! This is unacceptable for a paid app.

Details:
- Before update: 3.1.9
- After update: 3.2.1
- Device: iPad Pro
- Data lost: 6 months of work

I need this recovered immediately!

Jennifer Adams

subject: App Performance
body:
Hi,

The app has become very slow after recent updates. Takes 15-20 seconds to load on my iPhone 11.

Is this being looked into?

Thanks,
David Miller

subject: Export Feature Request
body:
Hello,

Would it be possible to add export to Excel functionality? Currently can only export as PDF.

This would help with my reporting workflow.

Best,
Lisa Anderson

subject: Sync Issue
body:
Hello Support,

My data isn't syncing between my phone and tablet. Changes made on phone don't appear on tablet.

Phone: iPhone 14 (3.2.1)
Tablet: iPad Air (3.2.1)
Both on same WiFi

Please advise.

Sarah Johnson

subject: Positive Feedback
body:
Just wanted to say thank you for the great app! The new features in 3.2.0 are exactly what I needed.

Keep up the excellent work!

Tom Brown

subject: Pricing Concern
body:
Hi,

I think the subscription price is too high for what's offered. Competing apps offer more features for less money.

Considering canceling my subscription.

Regards,
Mark Wilson
